title: zaluzianskya divaricata
intro: Zaluzianskya divaricata, also known as the evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oenotheraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has been linked to various health benefits. The health benefits of Zaluzianskya divaricata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as supplements or applied topically, and can be found in the form of capsules, oils, or creams.
